stimulus: Archaeologists studying the ancient city of Herculaneum in Italy recently uncovered a well-preserved bakery. The site contains stone ovens, milling tools, and charred loaves. These items give researchers a clearer picture of what daily food production in Herculaneum may have looked like. For example, the archaeologists found a stone mill that they believe was used to grind grain for the bakery's breads.
stem: Which choice best states the main purpose of the text?

answerOptions.content: To compare ancient tools with modern ones
To discuss the political system of Italy

rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The text reports that archaeologists discovered a well-preserved bakery in Herculaneum and describes the items found there.

Choice A is incorrect. The text doesn't compare ancient and modern tools. Choice B is incorrect. The text doesn't discuss politics. Choice C is incorrect. The text doesn't describe climate.
